mapper.select: SELECT TO_CHAR(checkin, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as checkin, TO_CHAR(checkout,'YYYY-MM-DD') as checkout FROM reserv where hotel_no = #{hotel_no} AND (reserv_status = 'DONE' OR reserv_status = 'READY') order by reserv_date desc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reserv( reserv_no, reserv_name, reserv_phone, reserv_people, reserv_status, reserv_date, checkin, checkout, reserv_price, order_id, user_no, hotel_no, hotel_name, reserv_etc) VALUES( reserv_seq.nextval, #{reserv_name}, #{reserv_phone}, #{reserv_people}, 'READY', SYSDATE, TO_DATE(#{checkin},'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{checkout},'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{price}, #{orderId}, #{userNo}, #{hotelNo}, #{hotelName},#{reserv_etc})
mapper.update: UPDATE reserv SET reserv_status = 'DONE' WHERE order_id = #{orderId} AND reserv_status = 'READY'
mapper.select: SELECT r.reserv_no, r.reserv_price, r.reserv_name, r.reserv_phone, h.hotel_name, TO_CHAR(r.checkin, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as checkin, TO_CHAR(r.checkout,'YYYY-MM-DD') as checkout FROM reserv r INNER JOIN hotel h ON r.hotel_no = h.hotel_no WHERE r.order_id = #{orderId}
SELECT user_no, reserv_status, TO_CHAR(checkin, 'YYYY-MM-DD') as checkin FROM reserv WHERE order_id = #{orderId}
